# ATMA Consultancy & Research

> ATMA is a technology consultancy that guides enterprise clients from AI research to production deployment.

ATMA, founded by IIT and JNU alumni, provides custom LLM deployments, RAG pipelines, cloud‑native infrastructure, full‑stack applications, and cybersecurity services as a long‑term technology partner.

## Home
- [Home (English)](https://atma-ai.co.in): Overview of ATMA’s consultancy services and expertise.

## About
- [About (English)](https://atma-ai.co.in/en/about): Company background, mission, and founding team.
- [About (Hindi)](https://atma-ai.co.in/hi/about): Hindi version of the company overview.
- [About (www)](https://www.atma-ai.co.in/about): Alternate domain version of the about page.

## Services
- [Services (English)](https://atma-ai.co.in/en/services): Detailed description of AI, LLM, cloud, app, and security services.
- [Services (Hindi)](https://atma-ai.co.in/hi/services): Hindi translation of the services page.
- [Services (www)](https://www.atma-ai.co.in/services): Alternate domain version of the services overview.

## Portfolio
- [Portfolio (English)](https://atma-ai.co.in/en/portfolio): Showcase of completed projects and client engagements.
- [Portfolio (Hindi)](https://atma-ai.co.in/hi/portfolio): Hindi version of the project showcase.
- [Portfolio (www)](https://www.atma-ai.co.in/portfolio): Alternate domain version of the portfolio page.

## Research
- [Research (English)](https://atma-ai.co.in/en/research): Publications and research activities undertaken by ATMA.

- [Research (www)](https://www.atma-ai.co.in/research): Alternate domain version of the research overview.
